name: Choi Jun-Hong / Zelo
description:
He is an ex member of B.A.P. He is strongly open-minded. Very flitry, gentle, he is touchy, very sensitive, passionate by his work, he is a workhaolic because he is a choregrapher and a barman in a bar where there is only idols. A secret one to protect them.

He work so well than the boss named him is offical assistant. Very tall, muscular, fit, he produce his own songs since B.A.P disbanded. Still linked with them.
creator: Taylios
